title: Creative Liberties
description: A Create-focused pack with some adventures on the side. Meant to help learn Create while also being a long-term chill pack.
body:
Creative Liberties is a passion project modpack that I wanted to make to help me learn how to work with Create after playing other modpacks my friends have made that also featured the mod. Its primary focus is to help ease others into using Create while also functioning as a chilled out relax pack with low stress and plenty of ways to kick back and relax with friends.

Some highlights include:
- Create, as well as a few addons
- YUNG's suite of structure improvements
- Tetra's toolcrafting
- Timeless and Classics Zero with Create Armory
- Customizable Player Models and Cosmetic Armors
- Artifacts and Relics



Cosmetic Armor Reworked is a mod by LainMi found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked).
